openFindings.title: The promoted 002 deep-research prompt still launches the retired 006 packet
openFindings.description: The active operator prompt still invokes `--spec-folder=.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/026-graph-and-context-optimization/003-continuity-memory-runtime/003-continuity-refactor-gates/002-content-routing-accuracy`, so rerunning the prompt from `010-search-and-routing-tuning` opens the retired 006 lineage instead of the promoted 010 packet. [SOURCE: .opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/026-graph-and-context-optimization/008-skill-advisor/001-search-and-routing-tuning/002-content-routing-accuracy/prompts/deep-research-prompt.md:8] [SOURCE: .opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/026-graph-and-context-optimization/008-skill-advisor/001-search-and-routing-tuning/002-content-routing-accuracy/spec.md:6]

openFindings.title: Promoted child root review artifacts still preserve pre-promotion 017/018/019 verdicts
openFindings.description: The promoted child-root review outputs were not regenerated after the move under `010-search-and-routing-tuning`: `001` still describes the old Stage 3 defect even though the live rerank path now prefers `adaptiveFusionIntent`, `002` still reports a metadata-only routing bug that the shipped handler and regression suite no longer reproduce, and `003` still points its dashboard at the retired `019` target. [SOURCE: .opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/026-graph-and-context-optimization/008-skill-advisor/001-search-and-routing-tuning/001-search-fusion-tuning/review/review-report.md:11] [SOURCE: .opencode/skill/system-spec-kit/mcp_server/lib/search/pipeline/stage3-rerank.ts:209] [SOURCE: .opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/026-graph-and-context-optimization/008-skill-advisor/001-search-and-routing-tuning/002-content-routing-accuracy/review/review-report.md:12] [SOURCE: .opencode/skill/system-spec-kit/mcp_server/handlers/memory-save.ts:1054] [SOURCE: .opencode/skill/system-spec-kit/mcp_server/tests/handler-memory-save.vitest.ts:1157] [SOURCE: .opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/026-graph-and-context-optimization/008-skill-advisor/001-search-and-routing-tuning/003-graph-metadata-validation/review/deep-review-dashboard.md:18]

openFindings.title: 003-graph-metadata-validation overclaims that the promoted root tree has zero legacy plaintext metadata files
openFindings.description: The implementation summary says phase `004` was retired because the corpus no longer contains any legacy plaintext `graph-metadata` files, but all three promoted root packets still store text-format metadata that begins with `Packet:` instead of canonical JSON. [SOURCE: .opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/026-graph-and-context-optimization/008-skill-advisor/001-search-and-routing-tuning/003-graph-metadata-validation/implementation-summary.md:10] [SOURCE: .opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/026-graph-and-context-optimization/008-skill-advisor/001-search-and-routing-tuning/003-graph-metadata-validation/implementation-summary.md:21] [SOURCE: .opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/026-graph-and-context-optimization/008-skill-advisor/001-search-and-routing-tuning/001-search-fusion-tuning/graph-metadata.json:1] [SOURCE: .opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/026-graph-and-context-optimization/008-skill-advisor/001-search-and-routing-tuning/002-content-routing-accuracy/graph-metadata.json:1] [SOURCE: .opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/026-graph-and-context-optimization/008-skill-advisor/001-search-and-routing-tuning/003-graph-metadata-validation/graph-metadata.json:1]

openFindings.title: 002-content-routing-accuracy still publishes contradictory completion state across canonical root surfaces
openFindings.description: The promoted root `002` packet still declares `status: planned` in `spec.md`, while `tasks.md`, `checklist.md`, and `graph-metadata.json` all present the same packet as complete. Recovery and graph surfaces therefore do not have a single authoritative state for the promoted root packet. [SOURCE: .opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/026-graph-and-context-optimization/008-skill-advisor/001-search-and-routing-tuning/002-content-routing-accuracy/spec.md:3] [SOURCE: .opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/026-graph-and-context-optimization/008-skill-advisor/001-search-and-routing-tuning/002-content-routing-accuracy/tasks.md:3] [SOURCE: .opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/026-graph-and-context-optimization/008-skill-advisor/001-search-and-routing-tuning/002-content-routing-accuracy/checklist.md:3] [SOURCE: .opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/026-graph-and-context-optimization/008-skill-advisor/001-search-and-routing-tuning/002-content-routing-accuracy/graph-metadata.json:3]

openFindings.title: Promoted 003 tasks still cite retired 019 root docs as completion evidence
openFindings.description: The promoted 003 task list still says it closed out root `019` and refreshed `019/spec.md`, `019/plan.md`, and `019/implementation-summary.md`, even though the promoted packet now lives under `010-search-and-routing-tuning` and validation reports those references as missing. [SOURCE: .opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/026-graph-and-context-optimization/008-skill-advisor/001-search-and-routing-tuning/003-graph-metadata-validation/tasks.md:13] [SOURCE: .opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/026-graph-and-context-optimization/008-skill-advisor/001-search-and-routing-tuning/003-graph-metadata-validation/review/deep-review-dashboard.md:18]
